title: pocket-id values
description: Configurable Helm values for the pocket-id chart.

replicaCount.description: Number of application pod replicas to run.

image.description: Container image settings for the main application container.

repository.description: Container image repository used for Pocket ID.

pullPolicy.description: Kubernetes image pull policy for the container.

imagePullSecrets.description: Optional list of image pull secrets used when the container image is stored in a private registry.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name portion used when generating Kubernetes resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full generated Kubernetes resource name.

podAnnotations.description: Additional annotations applied to application pods.

podLabels.description: Additional labels applied to application pods.

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context applied to all containers in the pod.

securityContext.description: Container-level security context for the main application container.

env.description: Non-secret environment variables passed to the Pocket ID container.

APP_URL.description: Public URL where users access Pocket ID.

TRUST_PROXY.description: Whether Pocket ID should trust reverse proxy forwarding headers.

PUID.description: User ID used by the container process for mounted files.

PGID.description: Group ID used by the container process for mounted files.

TZ.description: Timezone used by the application container.

ANALYTICS_DISABLED.description: Set to true to disable Pocket ID analytics heartbeat.

VERSION_CHECK_DISABLED.description: Set to true to disable automatic version checks.

envFrom.description: Additional environment sources such as ConfigMaps or Secrets.

secretEnv.description: Secret environment variables for Pocket ID.

create.description: Whether the chart should create a Kubernetes Secret from secretEnv.values.

name.description: Name of the chart-created Secret. Empty uses the release fullname.

values.description: Secret values to write when secretEnv.create is true.

existingSecret.description: Existing Kubernetes Secret containing environment values.

keys.description: Mappings from Secret keys to environment variable names.

command.description: Optional command override for the Pocket ID container.

args.description: Optional argument override for the Pocket ID container.

service.description: Kubernetes Service configuration for exposing Pocket ID inside the cluster.

type.description: Kubernetes Service type, such as ClusterIP, NodePort, or LoadBalancer.

annotations.description: Additional annotations applied to the Service.

port.description: Service port exposed inside the cluster.

targetPort.description: Container port or named port that receives traffic from the Service.

portName.description: Name assigned to the Service port.

extraPorts.description: Additional Service ports to expose beside the primary application port.

containerPorts.description: Container ports exposed by the Pocket ID pod.

persistence.description: Persistent storage configuration used by the chart.

data.description: Persistent volume settings for Pocket ID application data.

enabled.description: Create or mount the app data PVC.

mountPath.description: Container filesystem path where this volume is mounted.

existingClaim.description: Existing PersistentVolumeClaim name to reuse instead of creating a new PVC.

storageClassName.description: StorageClass name. Leave empty to use the cluster default.

extraVolumes.description: Additional Kubernetes volumes appended to the pod spec.

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts appended to the main application container.

ingress.description: Kubernetes Ingress configuration for exposing Pocket ID through an ingress controller.

enabled.description: Whether to create an Ingress resource.

className.description: IngressClass name used by the target ingress controller.

annotations.description: Additional annotations applied to the Ingress resource.

hosts.description: Ingress host and path rules routed to the chart Service.

tls.description: TLS configuration for Ingress hosts and referenced certificate secrets.

httpRoute.description: Gateway API HTTPRoute configuration for exposing Pocket ID through a Gateway.

enabled.description: Whether to create a Gateway API HTTPRoute resource.

annotations.description: Additional annotations applied to the HTTPRoute resource.

parentRefs.description: Gateway parentRefs that attach this HTTPRoute to one or more Gateways.

rules.description: HTTPRoute routing rules, including path matches and filters.

resources.description: CPU and memory requests and limits for the main application container.

livenessProbe.description: Kubernetes liveness probe used to restart the container when it becomes unhealthy.

readinessProbe.description: Kubernetes readiness probe used to decide when the pod can receive traffic.

tolerations.description: Pod tolerations that allow scheduling onto tainted nodes.

affinity.description: Pod affinity and anti-affinity rules for advanced scheduling control.
